problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
